title: Avaritia Unleashed
description: The mod made to poke fun at completionists expanded!
body:
Embark on a Galactic Journey of Automation, Exploration, and Ultimate Power.

This modpack delivers a fresh take on the legendary Avaritia experience, transforming its grind-heavy gameplay into a rewarding interstellar adventure. With the powerful integration of Create and Ad Astra, the endgame is no longer just about crafting infinite catalysts—it's about building complex automated systems and conquering the stars.

Dive deep into an extended progression system designed for players who crave a long-term challenge. Automate every step, master intricate machinery, and explore distant planets as you work your way toward god-tier gear and cosmic dominance. Whether you're building sprawling factories, optimizing celestial travel, or facing down cosmic bosses, this modpack offers hundreds of hours of engaging content.

From the deepest caves to the furthest stars, experience Avaritia like never before—bigger, better, and more grind-worthy than ever.
